b.name: Rare Fruit Stock Tracker
b.products_note: fruit/edible only (filtered from ~20,000+ total raw). HFT adds ~300 temperate varieties. Yalca adds 201 heritage/dwarf varieties. Forever Seeds adds 82 rare tropicals.
features: Daily scraping of 14 nurseries
Price/stock change detection
State-based shipping filter (all 8 states)
Species taxonomy (50 species, fruit_species.json)
Daily digest (text + HTML + shareable web page)
Email signup form (collecting subscribers)
Daily email digest to subscribers (via Resend)
Unsubscribe flow (HMAC-secured, Spam Act compliant)
Changes only filter
Price/stock change history page
Dated digest archives
Species pages (50 pages at /species/ for SEO)
Species browsing grid on dashboard (top 16 species by stock)
sitemap.xml (70 URLs, daily auto-generated)
Nursery profile pages (12 pages at /nursery/ for SEO)
Per-species restock alerts (notify me when species back in stock)
Weekly FB post template for community engagement
Location pages (WA/QLD/NSW/VIC — /buy-fruit-trees-[state].html)
Weekly data backup (Sunday 02:00 UTC, 4-week rolling)
Compare price pages (50 pages at /compare/ — cross-nursery price comparison for SEO)
Rare & Exotic Finds page (/rare.html — 22 rare species, shareable community content)
Variety/cultivar pages (2,308 pages at /variety/ — individual named cultivar pages for SEO)
Sample digest preview page (/sample-digest.html — shows visitors the daily email before subscribing)
Homepage 'Recent Highlights' section (shows real restocks + price drops to demonstrate subscribe value)
Nursery partnership page (/advertise.html — for nursery sponsorship outreach)
Location pages auto-rebuild daily (build_location_pages.py, species-filtered — no non-plant items)
Beginner's Guide page (/guide.html — SEO landing page for 'where to buy rare fruit trees Australia')
Bare-Root 2026 guide (/bare-root-2026.html — seasonal SEO page targeting bare-root buyers, targets June season)
Internal guide links added to species/compare/variety page footers (2,460+ pages link to guide.html)
GSC analysis script (scrapers/gsc_analysis.py) — pulls impressions/clicks/CTR/queries via Search Console API, saves JSON report
Sapodilla species page: 200-word growing guide (climate, care, varieties) for SEO
Homepage layout fixed: species pills moved inside filter section (Rule #1 compliance)

fruit_tree_cottage.note: does not ship to WA/NT/TAS, added 2026-03-15

all_season_plants_wa.note: WA pickup + local delivery, rare tropicals (mangosteen, wampee, jaboticaba)

heritage_fruit_trees.note: Heritage/heirloom temperate varieties. WA shipping in winter/dormant season (May-Sep). Added 2026-03-16.

perth_mobile_nursery.note: Premium WA nursery. Perth metro delivery. Rare mangoes ($770-880), figs, pomegranates, dragon fruit. Added 2026-03-18.

yalca_fruit_trees.note: Heritage/dwarf specialist. NSW/VIC/QLD/SA/ACT only. Seasonal: late June to Sep 15 (dormant bare-root). 201 apple, pear, stone fruit, fig, quince, berry varieties. Added 2026-03-18.

forever_seeds.note: Rare tropicals specialist. NSW/VIC/QLD/SA/ACT only. Rollinia, Canistel, Black Sapote, Soursop, Miracle Fruit, Jackfruit, Vanilla Bean Orchid, Cocoa, Coffee, Longan. Added 2026-03-18.

b.next_action: Perth Mobile Nursery outreach email SENT (2026-03-20). Follow up via WhatsApp in 3-5 days if no reply. Next: Heritage Fruit Trees outreach (DAL-38). WhatsApp Cyrus at Primal Fruits.

b_experiment_beestock.name: Beekeeping Supply Price Tracker

beekeeping-supplies-australia.note: Beekeeping products only (excludes pet/garden inventory). Added 2026-03-20.

beewise.note: Benedict's local Perth supplier. Stock proxy: enabled products = in stock. Added 2026-03-20.

features: Daily scraping of 4 Shopify retailers + 1 Magento retailer
Price/stock change detection (variant-level)
Static HTML dashboard with search, category filter, retailer filter, sort
Daily digest (text + HTML page)
9 product categories (Hives, Frames, Extractors, Gear, Smokers, Treatments, Feeders, Containers, Books)
Category pill strip (9 categories, horizontal scrollable, click to filter)
Price range display for multi-variant products (e.g. $187 - $215)
Sale filter checkbox
Email subscriber signup form + bee_subscribe_server (port 8098)
Welcome email on subscription (send_bee_welcome_email.py)
robots.txt + sitemap.xml (auto-regenerated daily)
flock protection on run-bee-scrapers.sh (no overlapping runs)
Category landing pages (9 categories at /category/ for SEO)
b_experiment_beestock.next_action: Share in WA beekeeping FB groups when ready. Benedict: confirm beestock.com.au is in Plausible admin (data.bjnoel.com).

infrastructure.hetzner: done — dale server (178.104.20.9, CAX11 Nuremberg, ~€4.39/mo), Caddy + Node 22 + subscribe-server
infrastructure.autonomous_dale: live v2.0 — cron at 18:00-21:00 UTC (2am-5am AWST, 4 sessions/night), 120-min cap, 200 max turns. Work tracked in Linear (bjnoel/dale). TASK_QUEUE.md deprecated. notion_poller.py retired.
